seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Karridale and Karroun Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Karridale vs Karroun Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karridale and Karroun Hill.
heading: Karridale vs Karroun Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karridale, Western Australia and Karroun Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karroun Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Karridale (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karridale or Karroun Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karridale has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Karroun Hill scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karridale scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Karroun Hill scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karridale or Karroun Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karroun Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
